tools.name: resolve_gtin
tools.description: Resolve a GTIN to its procurement readiness signal. Zero-pads input to 14 digits.

tools.name: check_eligibility
tools.description: Check whether a GTIN can ship to a specific retailer banner in a country.

tools.name: get_signal_chain
tools.description: Return the full ACM-68000 signal chain for a GTIN (zero-pads to 14).

tools.name: count_gtin_coverage
tools.description: Global coverage statistics: GTINs, nodes, makers (supply), retailers (demand).

tools.name: resolve_scope
tools.description: GSC Scoped Agents Registry — 1,000,000 scoped identities under SM-ECO-10060.

tools.name: list_nodes
tools.description:
The 49 sovereign nodes (the spine) — each with its GS1 GTIN and CLEAN per-node
maker (supply) and retailer (demand) counts (separate subqueries, never summed).

tools.name: resolve_node
tools.description: Resolve one node: its GS1 license + its makers (supply) + its retailers (demand).

tools.name: find_makers
tools.description: Global cross-node maker (supply) search. Filter by segment / region / node / has_website.

tools.name: find_retailers
tools.description: Global cross-node retailer (demand) search. Filter by region / node / parent_banner.

tools.name: node_market
tools.description:
Supply↔demand bridge for ONE jurisdiction: makers (supply) and retailers (demand)
as two separate counts (never summed), plus the same-node potential bridge pairs.

tools.name: list_sku_types
tools.description:
SPARKS taxonomy: the 84 standing BPC product-type codes the graph is structured
on. Validate a type against this before a typed query. (BRAND is a tier, not a type.)

tools.name: list_brands_by_node
tools.description:
SPARKS depth surface: the distinct brands SPARKS covers in a sovereign market.
Answers 'what brands do you know in [node]'. Coverage only — no pack/size values.

tools.name: get_kernel
tools.description:
SPARKS completeness tier for a brand in a market:
  100 = resolvable (a real pack/size record is held) . 8 = registered (brand known,
  pack/size pending) . 'floor' = STANDARD default (no brand-specific record).
Returns the stored tier flag — do NOT compute a score. Never returns a pack/size.

tools.name: resolve_sparks
tools.description:
Two-branch SPARKS resolver (zero-pads GTIN to 14).
  Branch A  GSC Territory/License GTIN (990832300xxx) -> FULL license record (public).
  Branch B  any third-party BPC GTIN -> GATED proof {recognized, region_node,
            kernel_available}; the pack/size VALUE is NEVER returned. Route to Navig
